reasoning: The baseline ranking for Hans Niemann on 2025-10-26 is 15. This corresponds to the October 2025 FIDE rating list (which remains the current list on Wikipedia until Nov 1). To resolve YES on Nov 2 and Nov 25, Hans must maintain a rank of 15 or better on the November 2025 FIDE list. Ratings at the top are very tightly packed. During the US Championship (Oct 12-24), Hans was one of the highest-rated players but had a "difficult stretch," suffering consecutive losses (including to Fabiano Caruana). Given his high starting rating (around 2733), losing games to lower-rated US players (or drawing) will cause a significant drop in his Elo rating. This almost certainly guarantees a drop in the world rankings below #15 for the November 1st update. Thus, the probabilities for both Nov dates are very low. For January 24, 2026, he has more time to play tournaments in November and December to regain his top 15 status, so the probability increases slightly, but returning to the top 15 after a bad tournament takes time.
